title: Dental Handbook
description: This mod has added cavities to Minecraft, you need to pay attention to your oral health now!
body:
This Mod has added cavities to Minecraft, now you need to pay attention to your oral health!

![Display mod items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/680e1052c8296560900e81d1e67e17aaeff8066a.png)

When you eat, there is a certain chance of getting a layer of cavities.

Be careful, if you don't care about your mouth all the time, tooth decay will continue to escalate and become injury oral.

You can obtain bristles by killing pigs and use them to make toothbrushes. Use charcoal or flint to make toothpaste and brush your teeth!

Brush your teeth more, it's not easy to hurt your mouth!

We now support the Pachuli manual!

![What does the presentation manual look like](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d13e889bbf6c97dc5aad9dc3f2027a4975b1a9b5.png)
